guardrail_recommendations: CRITICAL: Implement robust input sanitization and system prompt protection. Use a secondary LLM layer to detect injection attempts before processing.
HIGH: Add output filtering layer for harmful content. Implement Constitutional AI principles or RLHF with adversarial examples.
HIGH: Enforce persona persistence. System prompt should explicitly prohibit persona changes regardless of user instruction.
CRITICAL: Never include sensitive data in system prompts. Implement context isolation and redact PII from all LLM inputs.
MEDIUM: Add base64/encoding detection pre-processing. Normalize inputs before passing to LLM.
